OpenAL Soft 1.25.2 source notice

This distribution uses and redistributes the unmodified OpenAL Soft 1.25.2
Win64 library. The upstream file soft_oal.dll is named OpenAL32.dll here;
its contents are unchanged.

OpenAL Soft is licensed under the GNU Library General Public License,
version 2 or (at your option) any later version. See OpenAL-COPYING.txt.

Complete corresponding source provided with this binary:
  openal-soft-1.25.2-source.tar.bz2
Upstream source:
  https://openal-soft.org/openal-releases/openal-soft-1.25.2.tar.bz2
Upstream tag:
  https://github.com/kcat/openal-soft/tree/1.25.2
Tag commit:
  b2c48f7718ef3fcf67921a8b6534c4914e328970
SHA-256:
  1dbaac44e7579d5bc8847ca8db4b2e8b9fd3961041f35ee20def4958301e1089

No changes were made by aEngine to the OpenAL Soft source or binary.
OpenAL Soft project: https://openal-soft.org/

When redistributing OpenAL32.dll, keep this notice, OpenAL-COPYING.txt,
OpenAL-LICENSE-pffft.txt, and the complete source archive with the binary.
For download distribution, make the source archive available from the same
place and on terms equivalent to the binary download.
